rgb(69, 130, 192));">PR Bot</font></b></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));"><b>-&nbsp;</b>PRs opened to <font face="Courier New">main, release/x.y.z, or release/x.y.z-hotfix</font> get a bot auto-commit with the required version bumps before merge.</font></span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));">- PRs open with branch <font face="Courier New">prebuild/*</font> will get images and charts built and pushed to prebuild GHCR folders for each commit pushed for testing purposes. These are deleted upon PR merge or closure.</font></span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));">- PRs open to main from branch release/x.y.z will get a bot auto-commit including <font face="Courier New">CHANGELOG.md</font> file change and bumping versions to x.y.z. Upon merge, this will auto trigger the release process including all image rebuilds.</font></span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));"><br></font></span></div><div><b><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));">Direct commits to branches (not recommended)</font></b></div><div><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(69, 130, 192));">- If any commit is directly pushed to <font face="Courier New">main, release/x.y.z, or release/x.y.z-hotfix</font>, a similar bot auto-commit will run and push the change directly to that branch, then tag that commit has.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="925" x="225" y="919" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> span.font: - PRs opened to main, release/x.y.z, or release/x.y.z-hotfix get a bot auto-commit with the required version bumps before merge.
- PRs open with branch prebuild/* will get images and charts built and pushed to prebuild GHCR folders for each commit pushed for testing purposes. These are deleted upon PR merge or closure.

- PRs open to main from branch release/x.y.z will get a bot auto-commit including CHANGELOG.md file change and bumping versions to x.y.z. Upon merge, this will auto trigger the release process including all image rebuilds.

div.font: - If any commit is directly pushed to main, release/x.y.z, or release/x.y.z-hotfix, a similar bot auto-commit will run and push the change directly to that branch, then tag that commit has.
